heading: Request Query Parameters
body:
| Name         | Type         | Necessity | Description                                                                                                                                                          | Default |
| ------------ | ------------ | --------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------- |
| targetScheme | TargetScheme | Optional  | Type of targets to return. Values include:PUBLIC: Public internet accessible targets.PRIVATE: Private IP for VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) peering compatible targets. | PUBLIC  |
